---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for DripWear
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution
How would you implement this feature?

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Impact on Drips Ecosystem
How does this benefit the Drips Network and Stellar Wave?

## Implementation Complexity
- [ ] Low (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] High (> 3 days)

## Additional Context
Any mockups, diagrams, or references.
